chat.pageSubtitle: A space to reflect, ask questions, and feel supported

messages.openingMessage: Hi {name}. I’m here with you today. How are you feeling right now?
messages.exampleUserRestlessness: I’ve been feeling a bit restless today...
messages.aiResponse1: That can happen during recovery, especially when your mind or body feels unsettled. Sometimes it helps to slow things down and focus on what feels manageable right now.
messages.aiResponse2: Let’s begin with a grounding exercise. It can help bring your attention back to the present moment and create a sense of stability.

sidebar.emotionalTrendDescription: Your mood has been more balanced recently
sidebar.quote: Consistent small steps can create meaningful change over time

checkIn.pageSubtitle: Take a moment to pause, reflect, and notice how you’re doing today.

pain.label: Pain level
pain.helper: How physically comfortable do you feel right now?

journal.title: Journal
journal.placeholder: Write about how today feels, what’s been difficult, or anything else on your mind.

quotes: Showing up today is already meaningful.
Small steps still move you forward.
You do not have to figure everything out today.
Some days feel lighter than others, and that is okay.
Progress can happen quietly over time.
Taking a moment to reflect is part of caring for yourself.
Try to give yourself the same patience you would give someone else.
Recovery can look different from one day to the next.

posts.empty: No posts have been shared yet. You can start the conversation when you feel ready.
posts.emptyWithFilter: No posts matched this tag. Try another filter or explore all discussions.

sanctuary.title: Community space
sanctuary.description: HealEase is built to support respectful conversations, privacy, and a sense of emotional safety.
rules: Avoid giving medical advice unless qualified
Protect your privacy and the privacy of others

header.title: Your mood tends to improve on days that include mobility stretching.

header.title: Recovery Goals
header.description: Recovery can move at different speeds. Focus on steady, meaningful steps that support your long term wellbeing.

overview.greeting: Keep moving at your own pace.
overview.subtitle: Track your goals, milestones, and daily consistency.
overview.addGoalSubtitle: Create a goal that feels realistic and meaningful to you

statSummary.title: Goals Summary
statSummary.description: An overview of your current progress

insights.title: Insights
insights.emptyState: Complete more milestones to unlock personalized insights.
insights.failedToLoad: Unable to load insights right now. Please try again later.

emptyState.message: You have not created any goals yet. Start with something small and manageable.

goalForm.subtitle: Set a goal that feels clear, realistic, and supportive of where you are right now.

fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Add notes, motivation, or details that may help you stay consistent...

bundles.body: Smaller and more specific goals are often easier to maintain consistently over time.
tips: Start with goals that feel manageable.
Break larger goals into smaller milestones.
Focus on consistency rather than perfection.
Review your goals regularly and adjust when needed.
Choose goals that genuinely matter to you.

bundles.body: Goals tend to feel more sustainable when they are connected to your personal values and daily routines.
tips: Choose goals that support your current needs.
Track progress in a way that feels motivating, not stressful.
Notice small improvements along the way.
Allow flexibility when difficult days happen.
Share goals with someone you trust if that feels supportive.

bundles.body: Clear goals can provide structure and direction during periods that feel uncertain or overwhelming.
tips: Keep goals visible as a gentle reminder.
Adjust expectations as your situation changes.
Reconnect goals to the bigger reasons behind them.

descriptions.about: HealEase supports people navigating recovery after medical treatment, injury, or major life challenges. Daily check-ins help you notice patterns, AI-powered insights provide guidance, and community support helps you feel less alone through the process.
descriptions.benefits: Support designed for different stages of recovery
descriptions.hero: Track your progress, build supportive routines, and connect with people who understand.
descriptions.features: Simple tools designed to support recovery and wellbeing

footer.desc: Supporting healing through structure, reflection, and community.

toasts.checkInError: Unable to save your check-in right now. Please try again.

errorPageTexts.subHeading: We are working on restoring things.
errorPageTexts.description: Something went wrong on our side. Your information and progress are still safe.
errorPageTexts.crisisNoticeStart: If you need immediate support, please contact your local emergency or crisis support services.
errorPageTexts.journalSavedDesc: Your latest journal entry was safely saved.
errorPageTexts.systemHealthDesc: Most systems are running normally while this issue is being resolved.
errorPageTexts.autoRecoveryDesc: Our team has been notified and is actively working on a fix.

notFoundPageTexts.mainHeading: This page could not be found.
notFoundPageTexts.description: The page may have moved, been removed, or is temporarily unavailable.

networkErrorPageTexts.title: Connection interrupted.
networkErrorPageTexts.description: We are having trouble connecting right now. Please check your connection and try again.
networkErrorPageTexts.supportMessage: If you need urgent support, please contact your local care provider or emergency services.

inlineErrorTexts.generic: Something went wrong, but your progress and information remain safe.
inlineErrorTexts.network: Connection issues are preventing updates right now. Please try again shortly.
